name: Party Cheese Log
recipeIngredient: 1 (10 oz) pkg sharp cheddar cheese - shredded
1 tbsp chopped red pepper or pimento
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese and shredded cheddar cheese at medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (except pecans and parsley) to the mixture; mix well.
3. Chill several hours or overnight.
4. Shape the mixture into a log.
5. Garnish with chopped pecans and parsley.
6. Serve with crackers.
Prep time: 15 minutes plus chilling
